description_long: This object consists of three main battle tanks positioned side by side, each featuring a large, angular turret with a prominent main cannon extending forward. The tanks display heavy armor plating with sloped and modular panels, and additional cylindrical fuel or storage tanks are mounted at the rear. The exteriors are covered in distinct camouflage patterns: one in desert tan, one in light sand, and one in green woodland, each with angular, blocky shapes. Visible details include hatches, periscopes, antennas, and side skirts protecting the tracks. The tanks have robust, wide tracks for traversing rough terrain, and the turrets are equipped with secondary weapon mounts, such as machine guns. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility for urban or battlefield environments.
description: A trio of heavily armored battle tanks with large turrets, main cannons, and distinct camouflage patterns, featuring robust tracks and rear-mounted cylindrical tanks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three tanks' turrets, main cannons, and angular armor, highlighting their camouflage patterns.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the length of the tanks, cylindrical rear tanks, and the full profile of the turrets and tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back armor, cylindrical tanks, and the rear structure of the turrets and hulls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tanks' tracks, side armor, and the alignment of the turrets and cannons.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Each tank has one main cannon mounted on the turret and at least one visible machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, and modular armor panels; side skirts and reinforced turret armor are visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Distinct camouflage patterns: one in tan and brown angular shapes, one in light sand and beige, and one in green and gray blocky woodland style.
